task_completion.description: Navigate to the connection or port settings in the ADAudit Plus web console.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus web interface is visible in a browser, specifically on the Admin or Connection settings page where port and protocol configurations are made.

task_completion.description: Enable HTTPS (Safe Mode) in the ADAudit Plus settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox or toggle for 'Run ADAudit Plus in Safe Mode (https)' or similar HTTPS setting is checked in the web console.
The HTTPS port input field in the web console contains the value '8444'.

task_completion.description: Enable automatic redirection from HTTP to HTTPS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox or toggle for 'Automatically redirect HTTP requests to HTTPS' is checked in the web console.

task_completion.description: Export a screenshot of the final configuration to C:\workspace\https_config_result.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer showing 'https_config_result.png' in C:\workspace, an image viewer displaying the saved screenshot, or a save dialog confirming the path.

task_completion.description: Record the port number in C:\workspace\https_config_summary.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like Notepad) or terminal showing the file 'C:\workspace\https_config_summary.txt' containing the text '8444'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ADAudit Plus web console to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the web browser at http://localhost:8081, rather than just editing the server.xml file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the exported screenshot is of the actual web console configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image saved as https_config_result.png should clearly depict the ADAudit Plus settings page, not a blank screen or a text document.

integrity.description: Verify the summary file contains only the required information.
integrity.visual_evidence: The summary text file should contain the port number (8444) and not a direct copy-paste of the entire task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected HTTPS port is 8444. The configuration must have 'Run ADAudit Plus in Safe Mode (https)' and 'Automatically redirect HTTP requests to HTTPS' enabled. The screenshot must be saved to C:\workspace\https_config_result.png and the summary text file to C:\workspace\https_config_summary.txt containing the port number 8444.
